title: Uruguayan Beef Skewers with Japanese Flair
description: A fusion dish that combines the smoky flavor of Uruguayan beef with the sweet and savory elements of Japanese cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soysauce, honey, sesame oil, and garlic.
Add the sliced beef to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated beef onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions.
